summary: Completed testing of InmoBot new features: Audit Log page, Broadcast page, Bulk Actions on Leads, and collapsible sidebar. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests confirm all new pages and navigation work correctly.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tests used existing admin user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested: 1) Sidebar navigation includes Broadcast (📢) and Auditoría (📜) links - WORKING. 2) Audit Log page (/auditoria) shows history with filters - WORKING. 3) Broadcast page (/broadcast) with message form and history - WORKING. 4) Bulk Actions API (/api/leads/bulk-action) - WORKING. 5) Collapsible sidebar toggle - WORKING. Backend APIs tested: /api/audit-log (GET with filters), /api/broadcast/history (GET), /api/broadcast (POST), /api/leads/bulk-action (POST). All require authentication and work correctly.

test_results.navigation_broadcast_link: PASSED - Sidebar shows Broadcast link with 📢 icon
test_results.navigation_audit_link: PASSED - Sidebar shows Auditoría link with 📜 icon
test_results.audit_log_page: PASSED - /auditoria loads with filter dropdown and refresh button
test_results.audit_log_api: PASSED - /api/audit-log returns audit entries with correct structure
test_results.audit_log_filter: PASSED - Filter by action type works correctly
test_results.broadcast_page: PASSED - /broadcast loads with message textarea, filters, and history
test_results.bulk_action_audit: PASSED - Bulk actions create audit log entries
test_results.sidebar_collapse: PASSED - Toggle button collapses/expands sidebar correctly
test_results.leads_page: PASSED - Leads page has filters, tabs, and export button
test_results.auth_protection: PASSED - All new APIs correctly require authentication
